description: Method receiver taint propagation: zero-arg method call falls back to collect_uses_taint (receiver propagates); with-arg method call uses offset so only real args are checked.

expected.notes: Case 1: tainted.passthrough() — zero real args, fallback propagates receiver taint through to res.send
Case 2: tainted.passthrough('safe') — offset maps param 0 to 'safe' (not tainted), so no finding
